name: EduSphere AI Academy
description: An interactive, full-stack multilingual educational platform (Uzbek, Russian, English) for smart AI courses (Mathematics, Algebra, English, Computer Literacy, Robotics) from 0% (beginner) to 100% (expert). Includes personalized AI curricula, an interactive simulator, code playground, auto-graded quizzes, virtual certificates, a simulated Telegram bot, and an active community forum.
